title: Gillam Tarturi
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Gillam Tarturi |homeworld=[[Andara/Legends|Andara]] |birth=[[42 BBY/Legends|42 BBY]] |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Leadership School]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Gillam ''is'' the squad ... It was his idea. He formed it. He made up the bylaws. He recruited us. We wouldn't have done anything without him. We would have been a bunch of miserable outcasts.|Marit Dice|''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]''}} '''Gillam Tarturi''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the son of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Berm Tarturi]] who represented the planet [[Andara/Legends|Andara]] and, at face value, the entire [[Andaran system]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Gillam resembled [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in general height and build. He was the leader of a squad of young [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] that trained at the elite [[Leadership School]] of Andara. Other squad members included [[Marit Dice]], [[Rolai Frac]], [[Tulah]], [[Hurana]], and [[Ze]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|It's a big galaxy out there. We only have one another [now]. And that's a ''good'' thing. Together, we can be the best. We can have everything we want, if we just stick together. At first we did it because nobody wanted us. But now we can do it because we're the best. We belong together..."
"Maybe nobody wanted the others," Anakin said. "Or you convinced them that it was true. I don't know about that. But what about you? You're the son of a powerful Senator. Who didn't want you?"
"My father! [Gillam] shouted ... "And now he'll realize how wrong he was. Everyone will realize who underestimated my resolve.|Gillam Tarturi seeks to encourage his mercenary squad, now expelled from the Leadership School, against Anakin Skywalker's dissuasion|}} Gillam was persuasive and charismatic, which was how he convinced the others to join his group. He believed that his father paid little attention to him, ignoring him to look after his Senatorial duties. During a mission on [[Ieria]], he, along with his band, pretended to let [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] Anakin Skywalker join the band. He then attempted to murder Skywalker, so that he could pin his kidnapping and death on his father, but Anakin single-handedly defeated all six mercenaries. When the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and security arrived, Gilliam feigned innocence, claiming the Ierians kidnapped him. However, [[Ferus Olin]], who he thought was a nosy student, had discovered a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] containing his plan. The squad was expelled from the Leadership School and taken to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by Skywalker, [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]], [[Ferus Olin]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] for questioning, to sort out the lies, betrayals, and criminal activity that had occurred within the group. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Gillam Tarturi }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tarturi, Gillam}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mercenaries]]
